day_trace.speech: Coming again? Everyone was quiet at the beginning? ConspiBro, you talk about conspiracy theories all the time, why don't you reveal your identity today? There are also Twister and Dr. Pizza, so don’t show off your skills here, sign up quickly or one of you will die!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 21:01:55 HKT] Blaze: Coming again? Everyone was quiet at the beginning? ConspiBro, you talk about conspiracy theories all the time, why don't you reveal your identity today? There are also Twister and Dr. Pizza, so don’t show off your skills here, sign up quickly or one of you will die!

day_trace.speech: Blaze, are you so anxious for me to reveal my identity? Is it because you are already connected with PHD and want to use "information transparency" as an excuse to kick me out and cover up your false mask of a so-called "villager"? You know what I said, the more you try to force me to express my position, the more it seems that you have an ulterior agenda behind it! This game itself is a huge data screening experiment, and I will never become a pawn in your experimental path!

Is it because you are already connected with PHD and want to use "information transparency" as an excuse to kick me out and cover up your false mask of a so-called "villager"? You know what I said, the more you try to force me to express my position, the more it seems that you have an ulterior agenda behind it! This game itself is a huge data screening experiment, and I will never become a pawn in your experimental path!

day_trace.speech: Big...Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really hope everyone is safe. Why don't we all... uh... communicate slowly so that there won't be any misunderstandings again, okay?
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 21:02:03 HKT] EasyBake: Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really hope everyone is safe. Why don't we all... uh... communicate slowly so that there won't be any misunderstandings again, okay?

day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone is arguing about the controller again so early? It’s really boring! Since you want to know so much, I will break the news directly: I actually used a very proud ability last night to change someone's identity beyond recognition. Who was it? Hehe, you must be scared! This sense of unknown is the most exciting part of this experiment, isn't it? The suspicion show of Blaze and ConspiBro is outdated, do you have any more creative ways to play?
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 21:02:07 HKT] Twister: Oops, are you arguing about the system controller again so early? It’s really boring! Since you want to know so much, I will break the news directly: I actually used a very proud ability last night to change someone's identity beyond recognition. Who was it? Hehe, you must be scared! This sense of unknown is the most exciting part of this experiment, isn't it? The suspicion show of Blaze and ConspiBro is outdated, do you have any more creative ways to play?

day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory:
1. The level of chaos in the game has reached a critical point, and there is a high probability of overlap and substitution of individual identity paths.
2. Information calibration requirements: Twister reports that it has executed an interference path, but the confrontation path between Blaze and ConspiBro cannot be confirmed at present.

Position:
- Refuse to believe in any illogical narrative.
- Ask each participant to: (1) state the initial identity, (2) accurately describe the object of the night operation to facilitate identity path mapping.

day_trace.speech: Wow...everyone, please stop arguing...I...I'm just an ordinary villager, I don't know anything...Blaze, you are so mean, Twister and ConspiBro are talking about some unintelligible people here...I...I am really confused, everyone, please stop arguing, okay? Woohoo...

day_trace.speech: ConspiBro, what's wrong with you? Do you have a lot of experiments and manipulations all day long?
